hotel_name: Apec Mandala Mũi Né by LHG - Sea View, Hồ bơi vô cực, Alacarte, gần Bàu Trắng Bình Thuận (Apec Mandala Mui Ne by LHG - Sea View, Infinity Pool,  Alacarte, 17m to Bàu Trắng Bình Thuận)

reviews.title: Cockroaches the size of a thumb
reviews.text: My parents are old so they don't want to move, which creates a big issue. The problem lies with the host. No one would want to pay over *** per night only to encounter large cockroaches and have their entire family unable to sleep. Out of the 8 accommodations I’ve stayed at during my 3 weeks in Vietnam, this is the only one where I encountered cockroaches. You said to Agoda that there were no issues with the stay. That statement is incorrect. If there had truly been no issues, there would be no reason for my review to be removed or disputed. I paid for an additional night in full. Was there any discount or compensation provided? No, there was not. You said you would resolve this directly with the host, but there has been no response from the 15th until today. The listing clearly states that a sauna is provided, yet no sauna was available. This constitutes false advertising.
reviews.response:
We are truly sorry to hear about your experience and the inconvenience caused from outside to main door.

We would also like to clarify that, as a gesture of goodwill, we provided a complimentary free night on April 13th to support you during your stay so that the reason when you reached to Agoda customer service they rejected for more compensation as the hotel provided solution directly for guests. We offered support taxi fee, drink, foods, new towel, always check for cleaning your apartment 2 bedrooms frequently. We regret if these did not meet your expectations.

Regarding the sauna, it is a shared facility within the large building, and guests can request details assistance directly from our staff to access it. We will also review our listing to ensure this information is clearly to avoid any misunderstanding.

We truly value your feedback and will use it to improve our services. We hope to have the opportunity to provide you with a better experience in the future.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: so bad, was tricked into a very dirty room experience. the services at the hotel, the sauna owner wouldn't register so the hotel services couldn't be used, it's really terrible for the experience here.
reviews.response:
Khách sạn thành thật xin lỗi Quý khách và gia đình vì trải nghiệm chưa trọn vẹn do thời gian chờ xông hơi. Nhân viên khách sạn đã cố gắng hết sức giải quyết và khắc phục việc này kịp thời để Quý khách tận hưởng tất cả dịch vụ chỗ nghỉ đăng trên trang và thông tin đặt phòng. Khách sạn xin khẳng định cung cấp dịch vụ buồng phòng sạch đẹp và tất cả dịch vụ đúng như cam kết. Đội ngũ khách sạn nỗ lực cải thiện quy trình để phục vụ tất cả Quý khách tốt hơn.

Our hotel sincerely apologizes to you and your family for the incomplete experience caused by the waiting time for the sauna service. Our staff made every effort to promptly resolve and address the issue so that you could fully enjoy all the services listed on our website and booking information. We would like to confirm that the hotel provides clean, well-maintained rooms and delivers all services exactly as committed. Our team is continuously working to improve our processes in order to better serve all guests.

reviews.title: Nice view.
reviews.text: Suitable for a group of friends traveling together

reviews.title: The lack of parking space is very inconvenient.
reviews.text: No parking space is very inconvenient.

reviews.title: It's definitely worth experiencing.
reviews.text: The swimming pool is simply wonderful. No discussion needed. It has both gym and sauna facilities. The reception staff are polite and of high class. The rooms are new and beautiful. The only issue is with the internal electric shuttle service. The security staff and the shuttle drivers do not coordinate well. Some trips are overcrowded, while others have no passengers even though two shuttles are following each other. Tip: try to walk back to the shuttle stop near the hotel to find a spot. In any case, with this type of condotel, one must be cautious as there are many traps set up, and when issues arise, no one will help resolve them.

reviews.title: Kind staff
reviews.text: The host communicates quickly and tries to confirm if there is anything needed and reflect it. Although it is a bit far from the city center, it has strong advantages regarding noise and facilities. It is recommended to check the market to some extent during your stay.

reviews.title: Good for value
reviews.text: The hotel is far from centre but have all facilities such as swimming pool, spa, gym, etc.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Clean, well-equipped, with many activities suitable for families with young children.

reviews.title: The host is extremely friendly and enthusiastic. The room rate includes a swimming ticket.
reviews.text: The decor room has good taste. The room is clean and very comfortable. The host is very hospitable. ESPECIALLY, IT INCLUDES A SWIMMING TICKET, SO IT TURNED OUT TO BE VERY CHEAP.

reviews.title: View siêu đẹp, phòng sạch sẽ.
reviews.text: Phòng rất đẹp. View thuộc hàng khủng nhất trong các toà tháp rồi. Tiện ít ok, đầy đủ. Bạn nào đi xe hơi vào dịp cao điểm thì gửi xe ở dưới rồi đi thang cuốn hoặc có xe điện đưa đón mỗi 5p, cũng là trải nghiệm thú vị, các bạn nhân viên cũng rất nhiệt tình vui vẻ. Đi cả gia đình nghỉ dưỡng cũng rất phù hợp.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The uncle was very helpful and checked me in early. I was a bit confused while traveling and locked myself out, but he happily assisted me. The trip was absolutely wonderful, 100 points!

reviews.title: Worth experiencing
reviews.text: Excellent service, beautiful scenery, the sea is very blue and clean, a lively and fun evening atmosphere, definitely worth experiencing again.

reviews.title: An amazing experience.
reviews.text: The price is too good compared to what I received.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The hotel is very beautiful and clean. The staff is friendly.
